examples: Mrs. Madrigal heaped more carrots onto Michael's plate.
Mrs. Madrigal picked up a towel and began drying dishes next to her daughter.
There was a long, pregnant silence, which Mrs. Madrigal punctuated by reaching for the cheque.
She remembers the day Ines Madrigal was born, precisely because she was not there.
To meet people, Ms. Madrigal made herself get out of the house every day.
